headline: Hubbell Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results and raised its full-year outlook, citing broad-based demand in utility transmission and distribution (T&D) markets as well as accelerating activity in data centers. headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Hubbell, Raises Price Target to $560
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joseph O'Dea   maintains Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $530 to $560.
